summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of FitTrack fitness and nutrition tracking app. Login/signup flows work, dashboard displays correctly, theme toggle works, navigation functions. Critical authentication persistence issue prevents testing of internal features.

critical_bugs.issue: Authentication state not persisting across page reloads/navigation
critical_bugs.impact: Users frequently redirected to login, preventing full app usage

ui_bugs.issue: Initial chart rendering warnings about width/height (-1)
ui_bugs.impact: Console errors on page load, but charts eventually render correctly

passed_tests: Login page loads with all required elements
Signup page loads with all form elements
Sidebar navigation present with all links
Page navigation between dashboard, food log, nutrition database works
Dark mode is active by default as required
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication state persistence issue - users are frequently logged out and redirected to login page during navigation. This prevents full testing and usage of internal app features. Consider implementing proper session management or local storage for auth state.
success_percentage: frontend: 70% (core UI works but auth persistence blocks full functionality)
